title: September 15
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 15''' is the 258th day of the year (259th in leap years). There are 107 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1800s#1895|1895]] – [[J. M. Meulenhoff]] is founded.
*[[1920s#1922|1922]] – [[Bob Anderson]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Tom Hardy]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Ben Schwartz]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 65|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 65]] published.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]] released on the [[Wikipedia:PlayStation|PlayStation]] platform.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Galaxy at War]]'' released.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire Trilogy]]'' released.
*2010 – [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (video game)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] released.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars: Jedi Fallen Order - Dark Temple (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Jedi Fallen Order - Dark Temple'' trade paperback]] published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars Rebels, Vol. 2]]'' published in Japan.
*[[2021]] – [[War of the Bounty Hunters – Boushh 1|''War of the Bounty Hunters – Boushh'' 1]] published.
*2021 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 16|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 16]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic Adventures — The Monster of Temple Peak 2|''The High Republic Adventures — The Monster of Temple Peak'' 2]] published.
*2021 – ''[[Leia, Princess of Alderaan, Vol. 2]]'' published in Japanese.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Rebels, Vol. 3]]'' published in Japanese.
*2021 – ''[[The Mandalorian: Bounty on the Move]]'' published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Insider 205|''Star Wars Insider'' 205]] published.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Reign of the Empire: Edge of the Abyss]]'' to be published.
*2026 – [[Reign of the Empire: Edge of the Abyss (audiobook)|''Reign of the Empire: Edge of the Abyss'' audiobook]] to be released.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch—Rogue Agents (trade paperback)]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Smugglers and Scoundrels: The Race for Jabba's Bounty]]'' to be published.
<noinclude>
